description: TransiLog generated candidate circuits with Xyce SPICE simulation results.
source: TransiLog e-graph equality saturation + structural diversity filtering

circuit_static.parquet.description: Static features per candidate circuit. One row per unique candidate.

expr.description: Expression index from the e-graph enumeration

candidate_idx.description: Candidate index within the same expression group

transistor_count.description: Total number of transistors in the candidate netlist

gate_level_netlist.description: Original gate-level netlist (raw custom subcircuit names)

gate_level_netlist_std.description: Gate-level netlist with ASAP7-style standard cell names (best-effort heuristic mapping)

cell_types_json.description: JSON list of original custom cell types

cell_types_std_json.description: JSON list of mapped ASAP7-style standard cell types

input_pins_json.description: JSON list of input pin names

output_pins_json.description: JSON list of output pin names

pin_loads_json.description: JSON dict mapping each pin name to its estimated internal load capacitance

output_load_f.description: Output capacitive load applied in the testbench

timing_arcs.parquet.description: Dynamic timing arcs per simulation. One row per (candidate, vector, direction) combination.

vector.description: Input vector index for this simulation

switching_pin.description: The input pin that toggles in this simulation

slew_s.description: Input signal slew rate (transition time) of the switching pin

arrival_time_s.description: Time when the input switching signal crosses 50% VDD

DELAY.description: Measured propagation delay from 50% input to 50% output

slew_a.description: Input signal slew rate for pin a. Measured when a is switching_pin; otherwise backfilled with Liberty typical value

slew_b.description: Input signal slew rate for pin b. Measured when b is switching_pin; otherwise backfilled with Liberty typical value

slew_c.description: Input signal slew rate for pin c. Measured when c is switching_pin; otherwise backfilled with Liberty typical value

slew_d.description: Input signal slew rate for pin d. Measured when d is switching_pin; otherwise backfilled with Liberty typical value

arrival_time_a.description: Arrival time (50% VDD crossing) for pin a. Measured when a is switching_pin; otherwise backfilled with Liberty typical value

arrival_time_b.description: Arrival time (50% VDD crossing) for pin b. Measured when b is switching_pin; otherwise backfilled with Liberty typical value

arrival_time_c.description: Arrival time (50% VDD crossing) for pin c. Measured when c is switching_pin; otherwise backfilled with Liberty typical value

arrival_time_d.description: Arrival time (50% VDD crossing) for pin d. Measured when d is switching_pin; otherwise backfilled with Liberty typical value

standard_cell_library.name: ASAP7
standard_cell_library.notes: SIMPLE library subset containing AND/OR/NAND/NOR/XOR/XNOR/MAJ/FA/HA/TIE cells. No INV/BUF/AOI/OAI cells in this subset.

simulation_conditions.stimulus_format: PWL(0 0 20p 0 22p {VDD} 1n {VDD}) for rise; PWL(0 {VDD} 20p {VDD} 22p 0 1n 0) for fall
simulation_conditions.notes: All simulations use identical input slew (2ps) and output load (1fF).

data_quality_notes.null_delay_explanation: Some simulations did not produce valid DELAY measurements in Xyce .mt0 output, typically due to non-switching output or convergence issues for certain input vectors.

backfill_strategy.description: Non-switching pins in per-pin slew/arrival_time columns are backfilled with Liberty typical values so that every row has complete per-pin timing data.
backfill_strategy.source: ASAP7 Liberty file median across all LUT slew/load axes and delay tables
backfill_strategy.measured_when: switching_pin matches the column's pin name
